# Saab Chooses Anduril Rocket Motor Systems to Design and Produce Solid Rocket Motors for the Ground-Launched Small Diameter Bomb Weapon System

Saab selects Anduril to design and produce solid rocket motors for GLSDB, bringing speed, scale, and affordability to long-range precision fire systems.
